Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Crypto.com Arena
Los Angeles, CA
Previous Names:
Staples Center (Changed after 2021)
Seating Capacity: 22000
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 7
  DMB  (5)
  Dave & Friends  (1)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
08.20.08 - Seek Up (16:59)
Venue Picture
Description
Serving as the home of the Los Angeles Kings, the Los Angeles Clippers, and the Los Angeles Lakers, the Staples Center opened in the fall of 2000 and is anchored by a sports/entertainment arena with a maximum capacity of 22,000 seats. The project also included approximately 200,000 square feet of ancillary retail, restaurant, office and recreational uses, as well as 3,700 parking spaces on privately and publicly owned properties.
